The '''Daragon Trail''' was an extension of the [[Goluud Corridor]] and a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route. The route was named after the [[Human/Legends|human]] explorers [[Gav Daragon|Gav]] and [[Jori Daragon]] who first discovered the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. The Daragon Trail ran from Koros Major, which was later renamed [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]], in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] to [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] in the [[Stygian Caldera]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The remarkable part of this discovery was that the Daragons made it the entire way from Empress Teta to Korriban in a single, uncharted jump. It is the longest blind jump to have ever been made successfully.<ref name="TEA" />

A part of it later became the [[Carbonite Run/Legends|Carbonite Run]].<ref name="Date">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050414planet2|series=Byss and the Deep Core|text=Part 2: Empress Teta}}</ref> During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], a popular legend said that the [[ghost ship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Fa'rey]] haunted the Trail.<ref name="Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>
